notableEvents.label: Fernando Tatis Jr. GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Fernando Tatis Jr. grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Jackson Merrill out at 2nd. Fernando Tatis Jr. out at 1st.
